sentences.target: Die Qualität ist heute sehr gut.

translations.de: Die Qualität ist heute sehr gut.
translations.en: The quality is very good today.
translations.es: Hoy la calidad es muy buena.
translations.fr: La qualité est très bonne aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi la qualità è molto buona.
translations.pt: Hoje a qualidade está muito boa.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chất lượng rất tốt.
translations.nl: De kwaliteit is vandaag erg goed.
translations.el: Σήμερα η ποιότητα είναι πολύ καλή.
translations.nb: Kvaliteten er veldig bra i dag.
translations.da: Kvaliteten er rigtig god i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は品質がとても良いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; introduces the subject noun 'Qualität'.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular functioning as the subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicative adjective.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, specifying the time frame.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'gut'.
Predicative adjective serving as the complement to the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Ich achte auf gute Qualität beim Kaffee.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈaxtə aʊf ˈɡuːtə kvaliˈtɛːt baɪ̯m ˈkafeː/

translations.de: Ich achte auf gute Qualität beim Kaffee.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈaxtə aʊf ˈɡuːtə kvaliˈtɛːt baɪ̯m ˈkafeː/
translations.en: I look for good quality in coffee.
translations.es: Busco buena calidad en el café.
translations.fr: Je cherche du café de bonne qualité.
translations.yue: 我買咖啡會揀高質素嘅。
translations.pt: Eu procuro café de boa qualidade.
translations.he: אני מקפיד על איכות טובה בקפה.
translations.vi: Tôi chọn cà phê chất lượng tốt.
translations.nl: Ik ga voor koffie van goede kwaliteit.
translations.hi: मैं अच्छी क्वालिटी की कॉफ़ी ढूँढ़ता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg ser etter kaffe av god kvalitet.
translations.id: Saya mencari kopi yang berkualitas baik.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter kaffe av bra kvalitet.
translations.da: Jeg går efter kaffe i god kvalitet.
translations.ja: コーヒーは質の良いものを選びます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite lexical verb, 1st person singular present; selects a prepositional complement with 'auf'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the PP that functions as the verb's complement.
Attributive adjective, feminine accusative singular (strong inflection); modifies 'Qualität'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'auf'.
Contracted preposition ('bei' + definite article 'dem'); governs dative and introduces a PP indicating context/domain.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; complement of the preposition 'beim'.

sentences.target: Die Qualität der Jacke gefällt mir.

translations.de: Die Qualität der Jacke gefällt mir.
translations.es: Me gusta la calidad de la chaqueta.
translations.fr: J’aime la qualité de la veste.
translations.it: Mi piace la qualità della giacca.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢这件夹克的质量。
translations.yue: 我鍾意呢件外套嘅質素。
translations.he: אני אוהב את האיכות של הז׳קט.
translations.vi: Tôi thích chất lượng của chiếc áo khoác.
translations.nl: Ik vind de kwaliteit van de jas goed.
translations.hi: मुझे इस जैकेट की क्वालिटी पसंद है.
translations.pl: Podoba mi się jakość tej kurtki.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει η ποιότητα του μπουφάν.
translations.cs: Líbí se mi kvalita té bundy.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide kvaliteten på jakken.
translations.ja: このジャケットの品質が気に入っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; introduces the subject noun 'Qualität'.
Common noun, feminine; head of the NP serving as the clause's subject.
Definite article, feminine genitive singular; marks 'Jacke' as a genitive dependent of 'Qualität'.
Common noun, feminine genitive singular; genitive modifier (attribute) of 'Qualität'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; takes nominative subject ('Die Qualität der Jacke') and dative experiencer ('mir').
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/experiencer of 'gefällt'.

sentences.target: Für die Qualität zahle ich gern mehr.
sentences.reading: /fyːɐ̯ diː kvaliˈtɛːt ˈtsaːlə ɪç ɡɛʁn meːɐ̯/

translations.de: Für die Qualität zahle ich gern mehr.
translations.ipa: /fyːɐ̯ diː kvaliˈtɛːt ˈtsaːlə ɪç ɡɛʁn meːɐ̯/
translations.en: I gladly pay more for the quality.
translations.es: Pago con gusto más por la calidad.
translations.fr: Je paie volontiers plus pour la qualité.
translations.it: Per la qualità, pago volentieri di più.
translations.zh-Hans: 为了质量我愿意多付一点。
translations.yue: 為咗質素，我樂意畀多啲錢。
translations.ru: За качество я охотно плачу больше.
translations.pt: Eu pago mais de bom grado pela qualidade.
translations.tr: Kalite için seve seve daha fazla öderim.
translations.vi: Vì chất lượng, tôi sẵn sàng trả thêm.
translations.ar: من أجل الجودة أدفع أكثر بكل سرور.
translations.nl: Voor kwaliteit betaal ik graag meer.
translations.uk: За якість я охоче плачу більше.
translations.hi: गुणवत्ता के लिए मैं खुशी से ज़्यादा भुगतान करता हूँ.
translations.el: Για την ποιότητα πληρώνω ευχαρίστως παραπάνω.
translations.nb: For kvalitet betaler jeg gjerne mer.
translations.id: Demi kualitas, saya dengan senang hati membayar lebih.
translations.sv: För kvalitet betalar jag gärna mer.
translations.ro: Pentru calitate plătesc cu plăcere mai mult.
translations.da: For kvalitet betaler jeg gerne mere.
translations.ja: 品質のためなら喜んで余分に払います。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP expressing purpose/benefit.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determines 'Qualität' within the PP headed by 'Für'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'Für'.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; main predicate of the clause.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'zahle'.
Modal adverb expressing willingness/liking; modifies the verb 'zahle'.
Degree/quantifier adverb (comparative of 'viel'); indicates a greater amount paid.
